heading: Attorney General to advise the President
label: 511 Attorney General to advise the President
text: The Attorney General shall give his advice and opinion on questions of law when required by the President.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 303R.S. § 354.(8th full par. on p. 241), .Feb. 27, 1877, ch. 69, § 119 Stat. 241
